root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as membername ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sum(sc_mem_kep_return_head.total_amount) AS c_money_amount ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.doc_place_status ,sum(sc_mem_kep_return_head.total_keep_amount) AS c_money_pay ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.group_section FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_cnt_m_coop ,sc_mem_kep_return_head ,sc_mem_m_share_mem WHERE (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no) AND (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_kep_return_head.membership_no) AND (sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) AND (sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock > 0) -- AND (sc_mem_kep_return_head.year_receive = 2025) -- AND (sc_mem_kep_return_head.month_receive = 01) AND (sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock > 0) -- AND ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between :as_bgrp and :as_egrp ) AND sc_mem_kep_return_head.total_amount > sc_mem_kep_return_head.total_keep_amount AND ( sc_mem_kep_return_head.payment_status = '0' OR (sc_mem_kep_return_head.payment_status IS NULL) ) /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.doc_place_status ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.group_section
